name: Encoding.com
description: Encoding.com — cloud video transcoding and media processing service

seo.title: Encoding.com — Object Storage / Media API
seo.meta_description: Encoding.com: Encoding.com — cloud video transcoding and media processing service

when_to_use: Cloud video transcoding to multiple formats and resolutions
Media processing pipeline with subtitle embedding and packaging
VOD transcoding with per-minute billing for media companies
HLS and DASH adaptive stream packaging for delivery platforms
Replacing on-premise encoding hardware with cloud API

pros: One of the oldest cloud transcoding services
Broad codec and format support (including legacy)
Batch encoding at scale with queue priority
cons: UI and API feel stuck in the 2010s
Slow innovation vs Mux or AWS MediaConvert
Docs fragmented across old blog posts
review.verdict: Dependable old-school transcoder, fine for batch VOD jobs — modern APIs offer better DX for new projects.
review.best_for: Media libraries migrating legacy video catalogs with broad format requirements.
review.not_for: Greenfield apps — Mux, Bitmovin, or MediaConvert offer cleaner DX.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Usage-based pricing scales up and down
